frontmatter.description: Log volume from a service has spiked far above its rolling baseline

signature.embedding_seed: logs volume spike noisy logger flood retention

body:
## When this fires
A service is logging at more than 3 standard deviations above its baseline. Risk: log-pipeline back-pressure, shortened retention for everyone, and ballooning bills.

## Playbook
1. Run top-log-templates to identify the culprit log line.
2. Compare against log-volume-trend to confirm whether this is a one-off burst or sustained.
3. Read recent-deploys-svc for a newly added DEBUG-in-production logger.
